seoTitle: Upper Wheatvale vs Urangan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Wheatvale and Urangan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Wheatvale vs Urangan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Wheatvale and Urangan.
heading: Upper Wheatvale vs Urangan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Wheatvale, Queensland and Urangan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Wheatvale has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Urangan (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Wheatvale or Urangan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Wheatvale has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Urangan scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Wheatvale scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Urangan scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Wheatvale or Urangan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Wheatvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
